evals.prompt: I built an AI scheduling tool and want to launch on MicroLaunch to get my first paying customers. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Pre-launch checklist with listing optimization, Pro vs free decision, engagement strategy over 30 days

assertions.name: pre_launch_checklist
assertions.description: Covers pre-launch preparation: landing page, screenshots, tagline, or analytics setup

assertions.name: pro_vs_free
assertions.description: Discusses Pro Launch vs free submission tradeoffs (queue, 2x boost, backlinks)

assertions.name: engagement_strategy
assertions.description: Describes the 30-day engagement approach or sustained visibility strategy

assertions.name: deal_suggestion
assertions.description: Suggests a lifetime deal or discount for the marketplace to drive first revenue

evals.prompt: Is it worth paying $39 for MicroLaunch Pro or should I just submit for free?
evals.expected_output: ROI comparison of free vs Pro with backlink value, queue speed, and boost benefits

assertions.name: queue_difference
assertions.description: Mentions free queue wait time vs Pro's skip-queue benefit

assertions.name: backlink_value
assertions.description: Mentions DR59+ do-follow backlinks or their SEO value as part of the Pro ROI

assertions.name: visibility_boost
assertions.description: Mentions 2x boost or featured spots for Pro launches

assertions.name: recommendation
assertions.description: Provides a clear recommendation based on the user's situation

evals.prompt: My product has been on MicroLaunch for 2 weeks but I'm getting barely any votes or engagement
evals.expected_output: Engagement troubleshooting with tagline, screenshot, and community participation advice

assertions.name: tagline_optimization
assertions.description: Suggests improving the tagline to be problem-focused

assertions.name: active_engagement
assertions.description: Recommends engaging with other products and the community

assertions.name: realistic_expectations
assertions.description: Sets realistic traffic expectations given MicroLaunch's ~2,600 daily visitors

assertions.name: share_externally
assertions.description: Suggests sharing the listing with existing audience (Twitter, email, communities)
